text.title: Program Weekly Note Template Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to author and close the note.

step.name: gather
step.input: Workstream pulse + risk register + last-week note
step.action: Collect inputs into a shared scratchpad.

step.name: draft
step.action: Populate template sections; force top-3 risks-moved; number sponsor asks.

step.name: review
step.action: Trio review (PM + sponsor proxy + workstream lead); test headline brevity.

step.name: publish
step.action: Commit to programme knowledge space + ping sponsor channel.

step.name: close-loop
step.action: Update last-week outcomes section of next note with status of each prior ask/decision.
